channel.title: Comments on: Episode 28 – Clipper City Winter Storm
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Ben Volen
item.dc:creator: Ben Volen
item.content:encoded:
“This is a good beer, I’m not even lying about that!”

Your welcome Clipper City Brewing Co.

I’ll take my check by mail
